childElements.name: Deployment_Size
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "How large is your deployment?", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12.0, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Small (1–5 servers, limited rack space)", "value" : "Small (1–5 servers, limited rack space)", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "Medium (6–20 servers, single rack)", "value" : "Medium (6–20 servers, single rack)", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "Large (20+ servers, mission-critical uptime required)", "value" : "Large (20+ servers, mission-critical uptime required)", "autoAdv" : null } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Primary_Goal
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "What's your primary goal today?", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Deploy a complete on-premise server infrastructure solution", "developerName" : "Deploy a complete on-premise server infrastructure solution", "value" : "Deploy a complete on-premise server infrastructure solution" }, { "name" : "Integrate and manage APIs or cloud services", "developerName" : "Integrate and manage APIs or cloud services", "value" : "Integrate and manage APIs or cloud services" }, { "name" : "Automate business processes and workflows", "developerName" : "Automate business processes and workflows", "value" : "Automate business processes and workflows" }, { "name" : "Store and manage large volumes of data", "developerName" : "Store and manage large volumes of data", "value" : "Store and manage large volumes of data" } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100.0, "optionHeight" : 100.0, "imageCountInRow" : 3.0, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Support_and_Maintenance
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Do you need built-in support and maintenance?", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes - I want everything managed (hardware + services)", "developerName" : "Yes - I want everything managed (hardware + services)", "value" : "Yes - I want everything managed (hardware + services)", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "Yes - but I'll handle installation myself", "developerName" : "Yes - but I'll handle installation myself", "value" : "Yes - but I'll handle installation myself", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "No - I just need the hardware", "developerName" : "No - I just need the hardware", "value" : "No - I just need the hardware", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100.0, "optionHeight" : 100.0, "imageCountInRow" : 3.0, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: Step1
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "What Are You Trying to Build?", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "nextLabel" : "Next", "nextWidth" : 3, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

childElements.name: API_Management
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Do you need API management or integration capabilities?", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12.0, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Yes - we manage many APIs and microservices", "value" : "Yes - we manage many APIs and microservices", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "Somewhat - we have some integration needs", "value" : "Somewhat - we have some integration needs", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "No - not a priority right now", "value" : "No - not a priority right now", "autoAdv" : null } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Organization_Description
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "Which best describes your organization?", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Startup or small team getting started", "developerName" : "Startup or small team getting started", "value" : "Startup or small team getting started", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "Mid-size company with growing data needs", "developerName" : "Mid-size company with growing data needs", "value" : "Mid-size company with growing data needs", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "Large enterprise with strict compliance requirements", "developerName" : "Large enterprise with strict compliance requirements", "value" : "Large enterprise with strict compliance requirements", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "Highly regulated industry (finance, healthcare, government)", "developerName" : "Highly regulated industry (finance, healthcare, government)", "value" : "Highly regulated industry (finance, healthcare, government)", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100.0, "optionHeight" : 100.0, "imageCountInRow" : 3.0, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Platform_Control
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "What level of platform control do you need?", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12.0, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Basic - core features are enough for now", "value" : "Basic - core features are enough for now", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "Intermediate - need enterprise controls and granular access", "value" : "Intermediate - need enterprise controls and granular access", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "Advanced - need specialized features for sensitive/regulated data", "value" : "Advanced - need specialized features for sensitive/regulated data", "autoAdv" : null } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: Step2
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "How Mission-Critical Is Your Environment?", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "nextLabel" : "Next", "nextWidth" : 3, "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }

childElements.name: Implementation
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "How would you like to handle implementation?", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "We have an internal IT team - we'll do it ourselves", "developerName" : "We have an internal IT team - we'll do it ourselves", "value" : "We have an internal IT team - we'll do it ourselves", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "We want QuantumBit's team to handle setup end-to-end", "developerName" : "We want QuantumBit's team to handle setup end-to-end", "value" : "We want QuantumBit's team to handle setup end-to-end", "setAll" : false }, { "name" : "We'd like a hybrid - some help, some self-service", "developerName" : "We'd like a hybrid - some help, some self-service", "value" : "We'd like a hybrid - some help, some self-service", "setAll" : false } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100.0, "optionHeight" : 100.0, "imageCountInRow" : 3.0, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Services
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "What services do you need most?", "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "horizontalMode" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "Hardware setup and rack installation", "developerName" : "Hardware setup and rack installation", "value" : "Hardware setup and rack installation" }, { "name" : "Software configuration and integration", "developerName" : "Software configuration and integration", "value" : "Software configuration and integration" }, { "name" : "Training for my team", "developerName" : "Training for my team", "value" : "Training for my team" }, { "name" : "Ongoing support and success management", "developerName" : "Ongoing support and success management", "value" : "Ongoing support and success management" } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "optionWidth" : 100.0, "optionHeight" : 100.0, "imageCountInRow" : 3.0, "enableCaption" : true, "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Time
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12.0, "label" : "What's your timeline?", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12.0, "required" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "options" : [ { "name" : "We need to be live ASAP (days/weeks)", "value" : "We need to be live ASAP (days/weeks)", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "We have a few months to plan", "value" : "We have a few months to plan", "autoAdv" : null }, { "name" : "No hard deadline - we're exploring options", "value" : "No hard deadline - we're exploring options", "autoAdv" : null } ], "optionSource" : { "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "type" : "", "source" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: Step3
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "label" : "How Do You Want to Get Up and Running?", "validationRequired" : true, "previousLabel" : "Previous", "previousWidth" : 3, "nextLabel" : "Build Solution", "nextWidth" : "6", "cancelLabel" : "Cancel", "cancelMessage" : "Are you sure?", "saveLabel" : "Save for later", "saveMessage" : "Are you sure you want to save it for later?", "completeLabel" : "Complete", "completeMessage" : "Are you sure you want to complete the script?", "instruction" : "", "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "remoteClass" : "", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "remoteOptions" : { }, "knowledgeOptions" : { "language" : "English", "publishStatus" : "Online", "keyword" : "", "dataCategoryCriteria" : "", "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "typeFilter" : "" }, "show" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "instructionKey" : "", "chartLabel" : null, "allowSaveForLater" : false, "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "" }
